hero.question: Tampa Bay Rays vs. Minnesota Twins
hero.prob_take: The market is pricing Tampa Bay as a near-lock at 87.5%, which means the crowd has already baked in the Rays' edge and then some, this isn't a debate anymore, it's consensus. At this price, you're paying heavy juice for what's likely a 75-80% true win probability, so the real money is laying the heavy favorite unless you have fresh intel on Minnesota's bullpen status.

daily_take.headline: Rays-Twins Odds Just Spiked 39 Points. Smart Money Knows Why.
daily_take.deck: Tampa Bay jumped to 87.5% overnight on a 39-point surge and $415K fresh volume. The market's pricing in roster news or matchup intelligence that shifted the needle hard. At nearly 7 to 1, this feels overbaked for a single game. Wait for the sharp money to cool it before chasing.
